Border Affairs Services

Border Affairs Services: Please check the status of your visa application, submit additional required documents, or update your application if needed (passport photo, employment verification, bank statement, invitation letter, or renewal of appeals). By entering the online panel or contacting your sponsor.

Guidance and Deadline within 10 days from notice.
Visit the Panel
If the downloaded panel does not work please login with any personal or application email.
📧 Email Login

Enter your full email address to access Border Services Portal
